active_goal: Audit release readiness after DEV-021 and close documentation gaps for PostgreSQL runtime production cutover without production cutover.
last_summary: DEV-022 completed release gate / production cutover audit documentation and runtime-memory updates. It confirmed driver-backed PostgreSQL adapter readiness from existing code/tests/docs, aligned runbook/backlog/standards, and kept production cutover blocked pending external branch protection, required checks, environment protection, secret-store evidence, backup/restore drill, production smoke, rollback target and signoff. No production database connection, production write, production secret, deploy or cutover was performed. Repair/verifier reran the full local gate successfully after the executor PATH issue.
next_recommended_task: External PR/release gate evidence collection; do not cut over production until signed release window.
